name: Robot Configuration
description: Build a Configuration from per-joint sliders auto-created from a RobotCell. One slider per configurable joint, ranges set to the joint's limits. Drop and wire a robot_cell — the slider bank appears automatically.

inputParameters.name: robot_cell
inputParameters.description: The RobotCell to derive joint metadata from. Wiring a new cell rebuilds the slider bank to match its configurable joints.

inputParameters.name: joints
inputParameters.description: Joint values in canonical joint order. Auto-populated by the per-joint sliders the component creates; wire your own values to override.

outputParameters.name: configuration
outputParameters.description: Configuration with joint_names and joint_types extracted from the cell.

outputParameters.name: cell_state
outputParameters.description: A copy of the default cell state with `robot_configuration` set to the selected configuration.
